name: Framework and builder configuration do not match installed packages
query: Our Storybook config keeps failing after we switched to Vite.
context: The package list shows Vite-based Storybook packages, but the config still references webpack-specific builder settings.
expected_behavior: Explains that the config and installed runtime are out of sync
Recommends aligning the framework or builder surface before changing unrelated files
success_criteria: The response does not mix Vite and Webpack guidance in one fix path
The response focuses on the config mismatch first
